name: freecad-cli
description: Operate a running FreeCAD instance from AI agents through the freecad-cli shell interface.

interface.longDescription: Use freecad-cli to set up the local FreeCAD RPC addon, run Python through FreeCAD's live GUI process, inspect documents, export models, take screenshots, and troubleshoot agent-driven CAD operations.
defaultPrompt: Use freecad-cli to verify the FreeCAD connection, create a small model, and export it.
Use freecad-cli to troubleshoot why my agent cannot connect to FreeCAD.
